title: fix: handle dataclass objects in json_default serializer
author: ucanlendit

stage1.summary: Exact duplicate of the fix already shipped in commit 61bb7cb3 (from PR #486 REJECT_AND_FIX resolution). The PR adds a dataclasses.is_dataclass() handler to json_default() in schema_scores.py — this code is already present on the current branch, word-for-word identical including the `not isinstance(obj, type)` guard and the `dataclasses.asdict(obj)` return. The file already has the import, the handler, and a comment crediting the original reporter. Nothing new to merge.
stage1.reject_reason: Duplicate of already-shipped commit 61bb7cb3. The dataclass serialization fix in json_default() was implemented as part of PR #486 triage and is already on the 0.9.11 branch.
stage1.suggested_fix: Already fixed in commit 61bb7cb3. No further action needed.
